title: Postmortem: TanStack npm supply-chain compromise
author: varunsharma07
llm_translation: Real supply-chain compromise on widely-used open-source library (TanStack/React Query). Chain: npm ecosystem fragility → downstream risk for web-app infrastructure providers (MSFT/GitHub Copilot, GOOGL Cloud) and SaaS platforms; signals need for supply-chain hardening tools and security investment.

title: UCLA discovers first stroke rehabilitation drug to repair brain damage (2025)
author: bookofjoe
llm_translation: UCLA reports a stroke-rehab drug candidate that repairs neurological damage; if validated clinically and commercialized, could reshape post-stroke treatment. Watch for Phase II/III timelines and licensing deals to public biotech, but early-stage discovery is not yet actionable for a 2-year horizon.

title: Google says criminal hackers used AI to find a major software flaw
author: donohoe
llm_translation: Criminal use of AI for vulnerability discovery signals a new attack surface and raises cybersecurity capex/compliance costs industry-wide. Chain: AI-assisted exploitation → enterprise and cloud providers (MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN) face higher security R&D burden and potential liability → security spending accelerates; regulatory scrutiny on AI safety hardens; broader macro implication for AI governance sentiment entering the next 12-24 months.
